title: Missing scope when calling package function

features.name: package function call with scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a function call to a function defined in a package using the :: scope resolution operator

features.name: interface localparam access in module
features.description: Code should include a module that accesses an interface localparam using dot notation

features.name: package function call with interface parameter as argument
features.description: Code should include a package function call via scope resolution where the argument is an interface localparam accessed via module port
